message:
feat: spectral fingerprinting for automatic agent classification via FFT (wa-283h4.9)

Radix-2 Cooley-Tukey FFT, Hann window, PSD, spectral flatness, peak
detection, and 4-class agent classifier (Polling/Burst/Steady/Idle).
19 unit tests, 9 proptests, 4 criterion benchmark groups (12 cases).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -140,6 +140,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "kalman_watchdog"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "spectral"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "scrollback_eviction"
 harness = false
